ast.name: text
ast.source: You're currently using the free tier. Configure your API keys below to get started, or upgrade to a paid tier for advanced features.
ast.target: 您目前使用的是免费套餐。请在下方配置您的 API 密钥以开始使用，或升级到付费套餐以获取高级功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✓ basic AI chat with your own API keys
ast.target: ✓ 使用您自己的 API 密钥进行基本 AI 聊天

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure your API keys. These are sent securely but never stored permanently.
ast.target: 配置您的 API 密钥。这些密钥会安全传输，但不会永久存储。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage rules applied to agent context based on `hydrate-rule` tags in file frontmatter.
ast.target: 管理基于文件前置元数据中 `hydrate-rule` 标签应用于代理上下文的规则。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure servers to extend capabilities. Only available with paid plans.
ast.target: 配置服务器以扩展功能。仅适用于付费计划。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will completely delete the existing index and rebuild it from scratch. This is useful if you're experiencing search errors due to corrupted index data.
ast.target: 这将完全删除现有索引并从头开始重建。如果您因索引数据损坏而遇到搜索错误，此操作很有用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation cannot be undone and may take several minutes to complete.
ast.target: 此操作无法撤销，可能需要几分钟才能完成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No entries defined. Click 'add new entry' to create one.
ast.target: 未定义条目。点击“添加新条目”来创建一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No rules defined. Click 'add new rule' to create one.
ast.target: 未定义规则。点击“添加新规则”来创建一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No servers configured. Add a server to extend capabilities.
ast.target: 未配置服务器。添加服务器以扩展功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to re-register your API keys? This will revoke all previously registered keys and count against your annual quota.
ast.target: 您确定要重新注册您的 API 密钥吗？这将撤销所有先前注册的密钥，并计入您的年度配额。
